name: forge-knowledge
description: Enterprise knowledge access plugin for Forge. Provides skills and commands for searching internal wikis, runbooks, ADRs, and domain models via the forge-knowledge MCP server.
author: Forge Platform Team

knowledge_base_path.description: Path to the knowledge base directory

wiki_endpoint.description: URL of the internal wiki API (Confluence, Notion, etc.)

adr_directory.description: Path to the Architecture Decision Records directory
